nodes.name: Manual Trigger - local demo only
nodes.notes: Local demo only. This workflow is started manually and does not send outreach or external notifications.

nodes.name: Fetch backend reminders - no external APIs
nodes.notes: Calls the FastAPI backend over the Docker network at http://backend:8000. No credentials, scraping, email or external webhook is used.

nodes.name: Format internal summary - no send step
nodes.notes: Formats a message for inspection inside n8n only. Future internal Slack or Discord notifications require explicit manual configuration and should remain internal.
